productDisplayName: FILA Women Tenet Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who seek aggressive traction and a supportive Fit, these Tenet running shoes from fila work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger.UpperHeavily meshed upper for maximum breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays with design for enhanced shoe structure and styleCentral lacing system for a customised fitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for a snug fitPadded footbed for all day comfortRemovable footbed to accomodate an orthoticBrand badge on the lateral midfootMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection OutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability with multi-directional lugs and a decoupled heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movementCurved midfoot with a transparent trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootShoe careWipe surface with a damp clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
